title: Climate Analytics Platform (Omdena)
description: Built an end-to-end climate analytics platform to predict and visualize climate impacts across Nepal with interactive dashboards and actionable insights.
highlights: Interactive dashboard with real-time data visualization
Climate impact predictions for multiple regions

title: NEPSE Analysis App
description: A professional AI-powered fintech platform for analyzing the Nepal Stock Exchange (NEPSE), featuring live market data, advanced technical signals, portfolio tracking, and structural trend analysis using Gemini 1.5 Flash.

title: Faah & Jai Hoo — Code Sound Effects (VS Code Extension)
description: Developed a VS Code extension that enhances developer experience by adding real-time audio feedback for terminal commands, debug sessions, and task execution, making coding more interactive and engaging.
highlights: Real-time audio feedback for success and error events (Jai Hoo & Faah sounds)
Integrated with terminal commands, debug sessions, and task execution
Custom sound support with volume control and multiple audio formats

title: ULOG: Log Normalization Pipeline (Omdena)
description: Contributing to development of a robust log normalization and classification system with data preprocessing and feature extraction.

title: JavaFX Ball Shot Game
description: Designed and developed a 2D Ball Shooting Game using JavaFX with physics-based mechanics and intuitive user interaction.

title: Hamro Yatra - Tourist Management System
description: Developed a comprehensive tourism and travel management system for Nepal with booking, authentication, and package management features.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A responsive personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and professional experience with modern design and smooth animations.
